subject: Add comprehensive calculations documentation
body:
Create CALCULATIONS.md with detailed explanations of all pricing formulas:
- Core calculation philosophy (static unit economics)
- Universal formulas for revenue, cost, profit, and margin
- Seller perspective: minimum viable pricing formulas
- Buyer perspective: ROI, savings, and payback calculations
- Equilibrium theory: seller floor vs buyer ceiling
- Model-specific calculations for all 5 pricing models with examples
- ROI thresholds and economic rationale
- South African market calibration details
- Formula quick reference table

Update supporting documentation:
- README.md: Add documentation section and reference to CALCULATIONS.md
- HISTORY.md: Document the addition of calculations guide
- TODO_REMAINING_WORK.md: Mark documentation task as completed

This provides complete transparency into the mathematical models and
economic principles behind the pricing calculator.
title: Add comprehensive calculations documentation
